positive: Synthwave aesthetic illustration of a neon grid sunset over a futuristic cityscape. Features palm trees, retro sports cars, and glowing neon signs. Vibrant magenta, cyan, and electric blue color palette. Vaporwave style, digital art, highly atmospheric, 80s nostalgia.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural lighting, sepia
